positioning: Obesity Killer Kit is a doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss support system for overweight/obese adults, delivered as a structured protocol rather than a loose supplement.
Positioning boundary: not a standalone fat-burner claim product; it supports adherence to a practical weight-loss process.
promise_claims: Core promise: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when the protocol is followed.
Primary promise framing is fast visible weight-loss support through adherence-friendly routine, not zero-effort outcomes.
eligibility: Primary fit: users seeking natural, guided, practical weight-loss support.
exclusions: Do not position for users below 18 years.
caution_conditions: Doctor review required before use for people on multiple psychiatric medications.
Doctor review required before use for people with multiple surgery history.
protocol_morning: Take OK Liquid in the morning on an empty stomach (first step on waking).
After OK Liquid, keep a 4-hour no-solid-food window.
Use true-hunger eating after the fasting window; no fixed meal timing.
protocol_night: Take OK Tablet plus 1/2 teaspoon OK Powder around 15 minutes before sleep.
fasting_rules: Zero-calorie drinks are allowed during this fasting window.
allowed_items: If still hungry: up to 30 g complex carbs (millets or oats).
Milk in tea/coffee is the dairy exception.
mechanism_allowed_claims: Protocol-based appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction + digestion support.
Helps users stay in a caloric deficit more consistently.
Supports digestion and gut comfort (bloating/acidity/gas/heaviness support).
Supports practical obesity and weight-loss efforts by improving adherence.
mechanism_disallowed_claims: Do not claim rapid fat melting by itself.
Do not claim zero-effort or no-discipline outcomes.
Do not claim it works with unlimited junk food.
safety_public_line: Public trust line: no side effects.
All-natural Ayurvedic formulation with no synthetic ingredients and no chemical preservatives.
safety_internal_handling: Internal handling note: first 3 days can be an adjustment period.
Provide close support and tracker-led guidance during early adaptation.
guarantee: If weight-loss start is not observed in first 7 days, refund applies only when BOTH conditions are met: protocol followed and daily tracker shared.
continuation: Continue in cycles until target weight or BMI 25.
After every 30 days, keep a 7 to 10 day break.
maintenance: No automatic bounce-back from stopping alone.
Maintenance requires caloric balance, balanced diet, and daily activity.
Optional maintenance support can be considered if needed.
proof_points: 31 unique ingredients and 44 total ingredient entries (20 liquid, 12 powder, 12 tablet).
Tracker-led support and 7-day refund policy with adherence conditions.
messaging_guardrails: No cure claims for medical conditions.
Use explicit obesity/weight-loss goal language; do not hide the product goal behind abstract copy.
on_image_copy_requirements: Every headline and subheadline must explicitly mention weight loss, obesity reduction, or clear weight outcome language.
Approved explicit phrasing includes: weight loss support, obesity management support, lose weight, reduce excess weight, 3 to 5 kg in 15 days, appetite control for weight loss.
Mechanism language must explicitly connect to obesity/weight-loss goal; do not use abstract behavior-only lines without naming weight loss/obesity context.

claim_a.text: In genuine cases, we can consider exceptions to our refund policy.

claim_b.text: Refund applies only if no weight-loss start is observed in first 7 days AND protocol was followed AND daily tracker was shared.

chosen_claim.text: Refund applies only if no weight-loss start is observed in first 7 days AND protocol was followed AND daily tracker was shared.

conflicts.resolution_reason: Higher-priority canonical override in product foundation sets strict refund conditions; exception language is lower-priority and non-canonical.

claim_a.text: Course can be safely repeatable with no upper limit.

claim_b.text: After each 30 days, keep a 7 to 10 day break; continue until target weight or BMI 25.

chosen_claim.text: After each 30 days, keep a 7 to 10 day break; continue until target weight or BMI 25.

conflicts.resolution_reason: Higher-priority continuation protocol defines mandatory cycle break structure.

claim_a.text: During 4-hour fasting after liquid, only tea/coffee allowed.

claim_b.text: After morning OK Liquid, 4-hour no-solid-food window; zero-calorie drinks allowed.

chosen_claim.text: After morning OK Liquid, 4-hour no-solid-food window; zero-calorie drinks allowed.

conflicts.resolution_reason: Canonical context snapshot is higher priority and explicitly defines allowed drink class during fasting.

claim_a.text: If BMI is below 25, user can still lose 2-3 kg with 15-day pack framing.

claim_b.text: Primary user is adults with BMI above 25; do not position product for users below 18; eligibility framing is BMI >25.

chosen_claim.text: Primary user is adults with BMI above 25; eligibility framing is BMI >25.

conflicts.resolution_reason: Higher-priority canonical targeting and extraction requirement require BMI>25 eligibility as default external claim.

dropped_claims.text: Your writing is governed by four books... (general writing doctrine block).
Split 2 pouches of OK Liquid across 3 days if weight is not reducing.
In genuine cases, refund exceptions may be considered.
Abstract-only mechanism lines (e.g., control your routine/reset your day/transform consistency) without explicit weight-loss or obesity goal.
Below-BMI-25 weight-loss promotional framing for this protocol.

product_info: Obesity Killer Kit is a doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss support system for overweight/obese adults, delivered as a structured protocol rather than a loose supplement.
Positioning boundary: not a standalone fat-burner claim product; it supports adherence to a practical weight-loss process.
Core promise: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when the protocol is followed.
Primary promise framing is fast visible weight-loss support through adherence-friendly routine, not zero-effort outcomes.
Every headline and subheadline must explicitly mention weight loss, obesity reduction, or clear weight outcome language.
Approved explicit phrasing includes: weight loss support, obesity management support, lose weight, reduce excess weight, 3 to 5 kg in 15 days, appetite control for weight loss.
Mechanism language must explicitly connect to obesity/weight-loss goal; do not use abstract behavior-only lines without naming weight loss/obesity context.
Adults 18+ with BMI above 25.
Primary fit: users seeking natural, guided, practical weight-loss support.
Pregnant women.
Women within 6 months postpartum.
People actively taking insulin.
Do not position for users below 18 years.
Doctor review required before use for people on multiple psychiatric medications.
Doctor review required before use for people with multiple surgery history.
Public trust line: no side effects.
All-natural Ayurvedic formulation with no synthetic ingredients and no chemical preservatives.
Internal handling note: first 3 days can be an adjustment period.
Provide close support and tracker-led guidance during early adaptation.
If weight-loss start is not observed in first 7 days, refund applies only when BOTH conditions are met: protocol followed and daily tracker shared.
Continue in cycles until target weight or BMI 25.
After every 30 days, keep a 7 to 10 day break.
No automatic bounce-back from stopping alone.
Maintenance requires caloric balance, balanced diet, and daily activity.
Optional maintenance support can be considered if needed.
70,000+ users served.
200 video testimonials.
31 unique ingredients and 44 total ingredient entries (20 liquid, 12 powder, 12 tablet).
Doctor authority and institutional backing.
Tracker-led support and 7-day refund policy with adherence conditions.
